description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 12th; Slot none; Price: 24,000 gp; Weight â. DESCRIPTION This stone grants you a +2 enhancement bonus to Constitution. The enhancement bonuses from multiple onyx rhomboids stack (up to a maximum of a +6 enhancement bonus to Constitution ). Cracked: Individually has no effect; when used in pairs, each pair grants a +2 enhancement bonus to Constitution. The bonuses from multiple stones (cracked or otherwise) stack, up to a maximum of a +6 bonus. Price: 12,000 gp. Flawed: This stone grants a +2 enhancement bonus to Constitution per stone, stacking up to +4 total. These stones do not stack with non-flawed onyx rhomboid ioun stones. Price: 16,000 gp. See Inferior Ioun Stones for details on cracked and flawed variant stones. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, bearâs endurance; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 12,000 gp
